nasb.text: ‘But when you unwittingly fail and do not observe all these commandments, which the Lord has spoken to Moses,

esv.text: “But if you sin unintentionally, and do not observe all these commandments that the Lord has spoken to Moses,

cnv.text: “如果你們作錯了事，沒有守耶和華吩咐摩西的這一切命令，

ccb.text: “如果你们无意间违背了耶和华借摩西吩咐你们遵守的命令，
